sections.title: Registration on the portal for foreigners
sections.content:
PERSONAL ACCOUNT:
Foreign citizens can register and access services

SERVICES FOR FOREIGNERS:
- Making an appointment with the migration authorities
- Checking the status of documents
- Receiving certificates in electronic form

REGISTRATION REQUIREMENTS:
- Email or phone number
- Full name and date of birth
- Correct information about accommodation

sections.title: Electronic appointment
sections.content:
APPOINTMENT WITH SPECIALISTS:
- Ministry of Internal Affairs (migration service)
- MFC (public services)
- Medical institutions

ADVANTAGES:
- Save time in line
- Specified day and time
- No worries about availability

HOW TO REGISTER:
1. Log in to the State Services portal
2. Find the service you need
3. Click "Sign up"
4. Choose a convenient time
5. Confirm your entry

sections.title: Visa type Student visa Student visa type
sections.content:
VISA FOR STUDENT to Russia:
- Validity period: depends on the training program
- Goal: studying at a university
- An invitation from the university is required
- Issued at the Russian Consulate

DOCUMENTS:
1. Passport (valid for min. 18 months)
2. Invitation from KubSU
3. Visa application form
4. Photo 3x4 cm
5. Certificate of good conduct
